name: Beef Bourguignon
recipeIngredient: 2 Pounds stewing beef, cut into 1 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Add the beef and stir to coat evenly.
3. Marinate for at least 3 hours (overnight if refrigerated).
4. Drain the meat, reserving the marinade.
5. In a skillet, sauté the bacon over medium heat until crispy. Remove the bacon with a slotted spoon.
6. Brown the beef cubes in the bacon fat using the same skillet.
7. Transfer the browned beef and bacon to a slow cooker.
8. Add the chopped onions, mushrooms, minced garlic, thyme, parsley, bay leaf, pepper, and salt.
9. Pour over enough marinade to cover the ingredients.
10. Cook on low for 8-10 hours until tender.
Note: Ensure all meat is cooked thoroughly before consuming.
